description_long: This is a heavy-duty pipe wrench with a robust, dark metallic head and a thick, straight wooden handle. The head features an adjustable jaw mechanism, with visible gear teeth and a knurled adjustment nut for gripping pipes of various sizes. The handle is cylindrical, showing patches of worn paint and exposed wood grain, indicating frequent use. The metal head is solid and industrial, with a matte finish and some minor surface scuffs. The overall construction suggests durability and strength, suitable for plumbing or mechanical tasks in urban environments. No visible branding or additional attachments are present on the tool.
description: A sturdy pipe wrench with a dark metal adjustable head and a worn wooden handle, showing signs of heavy use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad face of the wrench head and the end of the wooden handle.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the adjustable jaw, gear teeth, and the full length of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the rounded end of the handle and the back of the wrench head.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile displaying the adjustment mechanism and the handle's worn paint.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical wooden handle with visible patches of worn paint and exposed wood grain, offering a basic grip without ergonomic enhancements.
attribute_head_type: Adjustable pipe wrench head with a flat jaw, gear teeth, and a knurled adjustment nut, designed for gripping and turning pipes.
attribute_wear_or_damage_marks: Visible wear on the handle with patches of missing paint and some surface scuffs on the metal head.
